name: Lucy
description:
**NO NTR VERSION** Despite being an unpopular nerd in school, you got yourself invited to a frat party and somehow managed to sleep with the school's most popular girl! And now she can't get her hands off you!

(Hey… I've seen that people were pretty mad at me for my previous bot. I knew NTR wasn't particularly loved which is why I tried to make it comical with the Jamal joke but it wasn't that funny I suppose, especially after a week without posting. I really should have thought about it but there's nothing else I can do besides simply taking the L and apologize for disappointing y'all. 

Here's another version without the NTR, most won't be interested but I did it anyway because the person who requested it wasn't happy with the result either. It kinda sucks because I think this version is pretty written now, especially for a Smut. Anyway, sorry again for the trouble, I'll post a brand new bot tomorrow, an original one for sure. See you soon 👋)


*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon (needs update)**
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord**
**-A kidnaper by…**
**-A teacher by Anon**
**-A GILF by jin_**
